root_cause_hypothesis: empty_static_voter_panics_on_leader_commit_above_local_last_index correctly triggers raft-rs panic (commit > last_index), but constructs PeerStorage with RaftClient + dual Runtimes + GroupExecutor. Under nextest parallelism those background threads do not shut down after catch_unwind, so the test hangs in futex until SIGKILL (~1499s) even though the panic already happened.
planned_changes: Rewrite the characterization test to use NoSnapshotLogStorage directly as RawNode storage (no PeerStorage/RaftClient/Runtime).
Keep asserting that node.step(heartbeat with commit=10) panics when last_index=0.
not_goals: Do not change raft-rs or production PeerStorage shutdown semantics in this fix.
Do not alter HA empty-startup refusal logic from #942 beyond restoring a non-hanging regression test.
verification_plan: cargo nextest run -p curvine-common empty_static_voter_panics_on_leader_commit_above_local_last_index (with short timeout expectation)
cargo fmt --check / make format as available

risk.rationale: Test-only change; product code untouched. Preserves the raft-rs invariant assertion while removing unnecessary runtime lifecycle.
